历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 2928 → 3333 → 2043 → 1823 → 5147. From 2021 to 2024, the overall trend was moving forward (from about 2928 to about 1823), but in 2025, due to Henan's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category/History Category division), the ranking significantly shifted backward to about 5147, moving back about 3324 places compared to 2024. 2025 is the latest baseline ranking. The university's enrollment plan in Henan for Physics Category: 154 in 2021, 120 in 2022, 90 in 2023, 113 in 2024, and 232 in 2025 (including medical majors). In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 199, and the Medical Category plan is 65, totaling 264, a net increase of 32 compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 232, an expansion of about 13.8%, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it has consistently ranked 10th (Top 10), indicating a very high university level, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving rumors related to teacher ethics (the university has clarified the rumors and filed a case), with limited impact. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 24th, comprehensive popularity about 1.84 million), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting high attention from applicants. No obvious admission gaps in history. Fifth round discipline evaluation A+: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering. A: Mechanics, Business Administration, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Marxist Theory. A-: Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology. A- and above total 13 disciplines, with top-tier engineering strength. Electrical, Mechanical, Computer and other flagship majors are highly consistent with current high-demand majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity: Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended), etc., remain highly popular, highly matching Xi'an Jiaotong University's flagship majors, driving up application heat. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Henan is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from about 907,000 in 2025). Estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category candidates are about 734,000 (an increase of about 32% from 555,000 in 2025), with a significant increase in candidate scale intensifying competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (neighboring province to Henan), with strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (total 264 in 2026 for Physics Category + Medical Category), making it a major enrollment institution among out-of-province 985 universities in Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings as a baseline, the expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Henan (intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of the university's top-tier and flagship engineering majors (driving up heat), the expansion and candidate growth offset each other, but the candidate growth rate (about 32%) far exceeds the expansion rate (about 13.8%), overall intensifying competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 5773, with a range of 5273 to 6273.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University enrolls medical students separately in Henan Province. In 2025, the minimum admission ranking was 18,923, with a total medical enrollment plan of 61 students. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan increased to 65 students (an increase of 4 students, approximately 6.56%). This expansion is relatively significant, theoretically causing the admission ranking to shift backward. Since data from 2021-2024 does not separately list medical admission rankings, only the 2025 data is used as a baseline. After expansion, the ranking is expected to shift from 18,923 to around 19,600. However, due to the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the actual backward shift may be slightly smaller than the theoretical value based solely on expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). The university has strong comprehensive strength, with a long history in its medical department. Disciplines such as clinical medicine and basic medicine rank among the top in the country, enjoying a high reputation among Henan candidates. It is an important target institution for many science candidates applying for medical majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising nationwide, with majors like clinical medicine and stomatology particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province. As a leading medical education institution in the northwest region, its medical majors have a stable attraction for students in Henan Province. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan is 65 students, with a moderate scale, and competition will remain intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the calculation results of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and the trend of medical popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical majors in Henan Province in 2026 will be approximately 19,587, shifting backward by about 664 places compared to 2025 (18,923). Considering the dual effects of expansion and rising medical popularity, the predicted fluctuation range is 19,293 to 19,881. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to actively apply, and those with rankings within 19,000 have a higher chance of admission.
